name: Dinner Rolls
recipeInstructions:
1. Scald the milk and allow it to cool to a lukewarm temperature (approximately 90 degrees).
2. Dissolve the yeast in 1/4 cup lukewarm water.
3. Combine the dissolved yeast with the cooled milk.
4. Add sugar, eggs, salt, and oil to the mixture.
5. Gradually add flour to the mixture until all ingredients are well combined. The dough will be sticky.
6. Allow the dough to rise for about 1 1/2 hours.
7. Shape the dough into your desired form.
8. Let the shaped dough rise for a short time, then bake at 350 degrees Fahrenheit until golden brown (approximately 12 to 20 minutes, depending on size).
